untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of (1) accelerating gap moves with visual acceleration patterns and (2) largest gap in last 5-day period. The allowed indicators lack explicit gap detection, multi-bar comparative logic, and visual acceleration metrics. Returns can approximate gap magnitude but cannot reliably detect gap acceleration or comparative ranking across lookback periods. Emotional discipline rule (never exit on +1% adverse) cannot be enforced in rule engine without conditional logic bypass.
translation_notes: Attempted translation uses returns >2% / <-2% as proxy for gap moves and close directional confirmation. However, this loses the critical contrarian timing logic (entering against hysteria at acceleration peaks) and the 5-bar comparative ranking. The signal requires custom gap detection logic or a dedicated gap indicator not in the allowed set. Recommend: (1) add gap_size and gap_acceleration indicators, or (2) implement as manual overlay rule rather than systematic backtest rule.
